message:
feat(mux): migrate WebSocket compression from libdeflate to zstd

Replace permessage-deflate with app-level zstd compression for better
performance. The architecture is asymmetric:
- Server→Browser: zstd compression (fast decompression via fzstd)
- Browser→Server: deflate (browser's native CompressionStream)

Changes:
- Add zstd as git submodule (vendor/zstd)
- Create zstd.zig wrapper with Compressor/Decompressor structs
- Update ws_server.zig to use app-level zstd (binary frames prefixed
  with compression flag: 0x00=uncompressed, 0x01=zstd)
- Update transfer.zig to use zstd for file transfer compression
- Add COOP/COEP headers to http_server.zig for SharedArrayBuffer support
- Add browser-side zstd decompression via fzstd (pure JS)
- Add CompressionPool for managing compression in browser

Note: libdeflate is retained for ZIP files and Kitty graphics protocol
(both require DEFLATE format per their specifications).

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,6 @@
 [submodule "vendor/ghostty"]
 	path = vendor/ghostty
 	url = git@github.com:ghostty-org/ghostty.git
+[submodule "vendor/zstd"]
+	path = vendor/zstd
+	url = https://github.com/facebook/zstd
